title: Small Frame
description: This texture pack replaces huge, boring frames with convenient, small ones.
body:
# small frames
Texture pack reduces vanilla, old frames to new small and convenient frames. Many people face the problem that regular frames look too ugly on their base. And there is a need for an invisible frame, but since there is no crafting of an invisible frame, you will definitely need this texture pack! When objects are in the frame, the frame itself is almost invisible.
